product.name: Proof of Possible
product.thesis: Turn one uncertain assumption into a safe executable probe, interpret its directional signal honestly, and preserve every reasoned decision in a recoverable belief lineage.
product.ethicalBoundary: Activity is not belief evidence. Unsafe outbound contact requires explicit opt-in. Blocked and safe-stopped remain dignified results, confidence may stay blank, and directional self-recorded evidence never implies statistical certainty.

observations.assumptionShape: goal and constraint, without stable belief identity
observations.interpretationShape: observed, not observed, blocked, or inconclusive without directional branches
observations.actionTiming: receipt time also represented action time
observations.postReceiptDecisionPersistence: successor choice only; conclude/stop was not persisted

strategies.theme: Grade evidence, persist decisions, and expose exact lifecycle states.
strategies.proposal: Separate probe freeze, begin action, receipt, interpretation, decision, and successor.

strategies.theme: Structured assumption, diagnostic matrix, and evidence threshold.
strategies.proposal: Freeze target/unit, claim, observable signal, decision, plus supports/weakens/inconclusive branches.

strategies.theme: Preregister belief, select a discriminating next proof, and synthesize lineage.
strategies.proposal: Keep a stable belief ID and detect contradiction and low-information repetition after two receipts.

strategies.theme: Decision-grade kits, barrier-aware routes, and a local evidence brief.
strategies.proposal: Compile copy-ready asks/sends and artifact/check skeletons for act, prepare, support, or stop routes.

strategies.theme: Safe route, capacity pacing, and nullable confidence.
strategies.proposal: Offer countdown, active-effort, and untimed modes; exclude response waiting from active effort.
Migrate Frame 2 into a validated Frame 3 envelope while preserving unknown action-start time.

strategies.theme: Minimum disclosure and evidence integrity without adding sharing.
strategies.proposal: Keep support handoffs private and self-recorded in this frame.

strategies.theme: Executable handoff, one-decision review, and first-viewport assumption entry.
strategies.proposal: Put the handoff in the primary path and fold advanced branch editing.

consensus.scoringMethod: Each of eight strategy audits scored every candidate from 1 (do not ship) to 5 (essential now). Totals are derived as unweighted sums out of 40 and ranked descending. Equal totals are broken by the number of essential (5) votes, then candidate ID. The three highest candidates at or above 32 were selected; minority transfer and collaboration candidates remain evidence only.
consensus.rationale: All eight audits converged on stronger decision validity, humane execution fit, and longitudinal learning. Migration, accessibility, release provenance, and browser validation are required release work rather than additional product mutations.

selectedMutations.name: DECISION-GRADE, ASSUMPTION-FIRST PROBES
selectedMutations.summary: A stable structured belief compiles to a copy-ready payload or skeleton with preregistered supports, weakens, and inconclusive branches plus an explicit action-start event.

selectedMutations.name: BARRIER- AND CAPACITY-AWARE ROUTES
selectedMutations.summary: Act, private preparation, trusted support/accommodation, and safe-stop routes combine with countdown, active-effort, or untimed pacing and nullable confidence.

selectedMutations.name: BELIEF LINEAGE + REASONED DECISIONS
selectedMutations.summary: Every receipt decision is persisted with override reasons, lineage is keyboard-readable, and deterministic synthesis flags contradiction and duplicate low-information proofs.

decision-grade-assumption-probes.criterion: Target/unit, claim, observable signal, and decision are required and one belief ID survives proof and successor changes.
decision-grade-assumption-probes.evidence: core structured-assumption, strategy-change, successor, migration, and browser lineage tests

decision-grade-assumption-probes.criterion: Every pattern compiles copy-ready executable content and three directional branches that exclude activity alone.
decision-grade-assumption-probes.evidence: compiler matrix plus built-artifact handoff and branch journey

decision-grade-assumption-probes.criterion: Probe freeze, explicit action start, and receipt save are distinct timestamps.
decision-grade-assumption-probes.evidence: domain timestamp contract and Chromium Copy & begin journey

barrier-capacity-aware-routes.criterion: Unsafe ask/send fixtures never produce outbound contact without explicit opt-in.
Countdown, active-effort, and untimed pacing persist correctly; ask/send waiting is excluded from active effort.
barrier-capacity-aware-routes.evidence: timer domain tests and real-browser pause/resume journey

barrier-capacity-aware-routes.criterion: Blocked and safe-stop receipts accept nullable confidence and preserve dignified evidence.
barrier-capacity-aware-routes.evidence: nullable-confidence validation and untimed safe-stop Chromium journey

belief-lineage-reasoned-decisions.criterion: Every conclude, replicate, pivot, seek-support, or continue decision persists; overrides require and retain a reason.
belief-lineage-reasoned-decisions.evidence: decision unit matrix and successor browser journeys

belief-lineage-reasoned-decisions.criterion: Lineage renders assumption, branches, action/observation, interpretation/confidence effect, decision, and successor.
belief-lineage-reasoned-decisions.evidence: keyboard-readable lineage DOM and 320px/200% release checks

belief-lineage-reasoned-decisions.criterion: Two or more receipts deterministically expose contradiction, repetition, current support, and conclude/replicate/pivot choices without certainty language.
belief-lineage-reasoned-decisions.evidence: contradiction and duplicate low-information domain/browser contracts

release.criterion: Frame 2 primary/journal/export data migrates without loss or invented action-start time.
release.evidence: migration unit matrix and built-artifact localStorage migration journey

release.criterion: Import/export, corruption recovery, additive multi-tab behavior, no third-party requests, focus, and reflow remain release gates.
release.evidence: unit/static suite and automatic Chromium request/pageerror/console/overflow guards

release.criterion: Pages builds _site once, tests that exact directory, and rejects any byte change before upload.
release.evidence: full-artifact attestation before Chromium, byte verification after Chromium and immediately before the _site-only upload, plus a fail-closed ordered structural allowlist and nine equivalent-command/step mutation tests

release.criterion: A required post-deploy job compares the live SHA, tree, run identity, content digest, provenance bytes, and every manifest asset hash with the uploaded Pages artifact.
release.evidence: retrying same-run artifact versus live verifier with manual redirect handling; the mutable run result remains the source of truth

release.criterion: Provenance fails closed and release dependencies are immutable.
release.evidence: fake, mismatched, missing-git, and correct SHA/tree tests; every direct third-party action is pinned to a reviewed 40-hex commit

localMetrics.scope: Computed only from the local workspace; no telemetry or third-party requests.

criterionLinkedEvidenceRate.purpose: Preserve the honest Frame 2 funnel while exposing its numerator and denominator.

directionalBeliefSignals.formula: receipts with supports or weakens interpretation after explicit action start
directionalBeliefSignals.purpose: Prevent sending, opening, completion, blocked, or inconclusive activity from satisfying the belief criterion.

lineageSupportState.formula: deterministic counts of supports, weakens, unresolved, contradiction, and repeated proof fingerprints
lineageSupportState.purpose: Guide conclude, replicate, or pivot without statistical claims.

activationLatency.purpose: Keep the explicit begin event distinct from freezing and receipt time.

tests.status: 75 unit/deployment/release-contract tests (66 prior plus 9 release-policy mutations) and static checks pass locally; 15 browser tests remain mandatory gates, followed by required live verification
requiredCoverage: persisted lineage decisions and override reasons
fail-closed structural rejection of build aliases, shell blocks, unexpected steps, reordering, missing verification, and upload-path drift

release.generatedProvenanceMechanism: scripts/build.mjs first performs fail-closed validation that GITHUB_SHA is exactly 40 lowercase hex, resolves as a commit and tree in this checkout, and equals Git HEAD; missing git or tree lookup is fatal. It then copies source into _site, hashes every artifact file except provenance.json, computes a sorted path-plus-file-hash SHA-256 content digest, and writes the verified SHA, tree, run identity, timestamp, per-file hashes, and digest. The frame record intentionally does not self-claim a mutable implementation SHA or run URL.

releaseGateRepair.scope: Frame 3 release integrity only; Frame 4 was not started and no product mutation was added.
releaseGateRepair.rejection: Independent verification rejected fail-open provenance, post-test rebuild exposure, missing live hash verification, inconsistent consensus ordering, and mutable action tags.
releaseGateRepair.policyReverificationRejection: The static workflow policy rejected an exact second npm run build but accepted equivalent npm run build --silent and node scripts/build.mjs commands.
releaseGateRepair.sameArtifactPolicy: CI builds _site exactly once, snapshots all bytes, tests only that directory, verifies it twice, and uploads only the attested directory. A fail-closed structural allowlist enforces every ordered Pages validation step and exact scalar command; any alias, shell block, action, mutation, reordering, omission, or upload-path change fails.
releaseGateRepair.postDeployPolicy: The required verify-live job downloads the exact github-pages artifact from the same run and retries live byte/hash comparison for Pages propagation. Missing assets, drift, or any redirect fail the workflow.
releaseGateRepair.priorReleasePolicy: The frame-03 tag remains immutable at rejected commit 229e037be328050617a9c20203db5f8df9d8a067.
releaseGateRepair.cryptographicSigning: No project signing identity is configured. Provenance is hash-verifiable but unsigned; no cryptographic signature is claimed.
